name: set_time_settings
description: Sets Unity's time manager properties (Project Settings > Time). Useful for adjusting simulation speed, physics update rate, and particle timing.

property.description: fixed_timestep: physics update interval (e.g. 0.02 = 50 Hz). max_timestep: max frame time. time_scale: simulation speed (1=normal, 0.5=half speed). maximum_particle_timestep: max particle system step.
